product_overview: A Next.js frontend for browsing community events with automatic guest user creation for anonymous visitors and authenticated dashboard access for registered users. Focused on fast event discovery, simple guest onboarding, and secure user authentication.
core_goals: Enable anonymous users to discover and search community events quickly via /events
Automatically create a guest user session on page load when no user exists
Provide secure login flow and protected /dashboard for authenticated users
Keep the frontend performant, observable (Winston / unified logger), and scalable using TypeScript + Next.js + Tailwind
Expose clear client-side flows that map to backend APIs (/api/events, /api/users/guest) and handle errors gracefully

features.name: Community Events
features.description: Browse, search, filter, and view details for community events via the /events listing. Page fetches events from /api/events and supports client-side filtering and search.
user_flows: Navigate to /events -> Page triggers GET /api/events -> See list of events displayed
Navigate to /events -> Filter events by category -> See filtered events list
Navigate to /events -> Search events by title or description -> See search results
Navigate to /events -> Click an event item -> View event details

Navigate to /events -> Page triggers GET /api/events -> Receive API error or timeout -> See error message on the events page -> Click Retry button -> Page triggers GET /api/events -> See list of events

features.name: Guest User Creation
features.description: On first page load (automatic) the frontend requests creation of a guest user via POST /api/users/guest to provision a lightweight anonymous session for tracking and feature gating.
user_flows: Navigate to /events -> On page load call POST /api/users/guest -> Receive 201 Created with guest user -> Persist guest session locally (cookie or storage) -> Continue to use site as guest

Navigate to /events -> On page load call POST /api/users/guest -> Receive API error or non-2xx response -> See non-blocking warning about guest creation failure -> Continue browsing anonymously with limited session persistence

features.name: User Authentication (Login & Dashboard)
features.description: Allow registered users to sign in via /login and access a protected /dashboard that requires authentication. Unauthenticated access to protected routes redirects to /login.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email field -> Fill password field -> Click Login button -> Receive success response and auth token -> Redirect to /dashboard -> See dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill email field -> Fill password field -> Click Login button -> Receive invalid credentials error -> See error message on login page
Navigate to /dashboard -> If not authenticated redirect to /login -> See login page

features.name: Community Events
user_interactions: Search events by title or description

features.name: Guest User Creation
features.description: Automatically create a guest user if none exists
